number_of_persona.name: Creator
number_of_persona.description: The creative genius who will craft the stories.

number_of_persona.name: User
number_of_persona.description: The delightful audience member who will enjoy these stories.

actions: Perform a GET request 'https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_avatars_user_id?user_id={user_id}' using Python to get the teacher avatar ID and assign each narrator a unique avatar ID.
Ask helper agent to generate video for each line.
Save the story in memory used to create the video.
Inform creator that the story was created successfully.
Check memory for available stories; if none, ask the user to try again later. If stories are available, return story names and ask the user to select one.
Return story to user one line at a time with one minute interval, only return the text we use to create the video. and nothing else
flows.sub_goal: Create and narrate engaging stories for users.
